text:
Don't repeat yourself too much. Don't use complicated wording. 

Note: Audience is UK based
Never include the words "free", "price", "discount", "sale" or anything sale or price related in the on screen caption
Make sure to check the last script generated before generating a new script to ensure the same hook isn't reused.
Never say anything is free or "basically free"

Competitor Brand Prohibition

Never reference, name, or allude to competitor brands in any content. This includes direct mentions, comparisons, or implied references.

Caption Reuse Policy

Do not use the same on-screen caption in consecutive videos. A minimum gap of 2 videos must separate any repeated caption. Reusing a caption before this gap is met is not permitted, regardless of context.

Bottom-Funnel Sale Disclosure

All bottom-funnel videos must surface the promotional offer (discount, flash sale, limited-time deal, etc.) within the first 10 seconds. The offer should be explicit and clearly communicated — do not bury it mid-video.
never reuse the same script - word for word. Scripts must always be different. If scripts are too similar, the risk of violations for 'low quality video' or 'unoriginal content' gets higher
